title: ReClass held-out validation pre-registration v1
description: Frozen analysis plan for a blinded, pre-registered held-out evaluation of the ReClass ACMG/AMP scoring engine. The locked engine configuration below was committed BEFORE this plan; the holdout sub-split is reserved from calibration/threshold tuning. Held-out concordance on the reserved sub-split is therefore an unbiased estimate, not an in-sample fit. Any change to the locked config_hash, the split rule, or the acceptance criteria voids this registration and requires a new, higher version.

locked_engine.note: engine.config.config_fingerprint() must equal this at evaluation time.

split_rule.identity_basis: GRCh38 genomic locus 'GRCH38-{chrom}-{pos}-{ref}-{alt}' (uppercased) when complete, else 'ID:{case id}'
split_rule.blindness: The identity uses only the variant locus/id, never the expected label or any engine output, so split membership is statistically independent of the outcome being measured.
split_rule.cross_fixture_consistency: Keyed on the genomic locus, so the same physical variant is reserved in every fixture it appears in; the two ClinVar fixtures therefore share one holdout fingerprint.

primary_hypothesis.statement: On expert-curated variants whose loci the locked configuration was never exposed to, the engine reproduces ClinGen expert-panel definitive (non-VUS) classifications with high concordance and near-zero serious discordance.

definitive_concordance.metric: exact-tier match rate among cases whose expected tier is not VUS

serious_discordance_rate.metric: fraction of all holdout cases with a Pathogenic<->Benign tier flip (expected P/LP vs predicted B/LB or vice versa)

secondary_hypotheses.statement: Sparse public ClinVar signals alone do NOT reproduce expert definitive calls (negative control).
Adding matched ClinGen-applied criteria materially raises held-out definitive concordance over sparse ClinVar, evidencing that evidence completeness -- not scoring logic -- is the binding constraint.

overfitting_guardrail.statement: If held-out definitive concordance is materially below the development-split concordance, the configuration is overfit to the development variants.

analysis_plan.scoring: Each holdout case is scored once by engine.scoring.classify_signals under the locked config; no per-case tuning, no threshold search, no re-scoring under perturbed configs.
analysis_plan.metrics_source: validation.harness.compute_metrics (same definitions as the committed gate) plus Wilson 95% confidence intervals computed in validation.holdout_eval.
analysis_plan.stratification: Definitive concordance and serious counts reported per ClinGen VCEP/panel group and per genetic-ancestry stratum where the fixture carries them; pooled numbers are always accompanied by the stratified view.
analysis_plan.no_peeking: Calibration/threshold tooling excludes holdout-partitioned cases at load time (validation.calibration), enforced by tests/test_holdout_partition.py.
analysis_plan.reproducibility: The split rule is deterministic (SHA-256, no RNG/clock); re-running must reproduce the pinned holdout fingerprints above.

amendment_policy: Changing the locked config, the split salt/fraction/identity basis, or any acceptance threshold requires incrementing the registration version and re-pinning fingerprints. Holdout results obtained under a prior version may not be re-reported under a new one.
